comment: T3dmium network audit allowlist. Default deny: a request is allowed
only if a rule under its own scenario matches its host (and optional
path prefix). An empty list means the browser must be completely
silent during that scenario. '*.host' matches subdomains only, never
the apex and never suffix lookalikes. Every rule must carry a
'reason' explaining which scripted user action generates the traffic.

navigation.reason: Scripted user action: the driver opens https://example.com/ as if the user typed it into the address bar.
Subresources of the scripted example.com navigation served from its subdomains (e.g. www.example.com).

downloads.reason: Scripted user action: the driver opens https://example.com/ and clicks a same-origin download link; the page fetch and the file fetch both target example.com.

search.reason: User-chosen search engine: the driver submits a query to DuckDuckGo on the user's behalf.
Subresources of the scripted DuckDuckGo search served from its subdomains (e.g. links.duckduckgo.com).
